title: Load and select an application
description: Verifies that a user can load the applications list, choose a mock application, and see its dependency graph render.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the applications list to load
Select an application from the list
Verify the selected application is highlighted
Verify the service dependency graph is displayed

title: Load a mock app graph
description: A user can open the app, choose a mock application, and see its service dependency graph render successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the applications list to finish loading
Select a mock application from the applications list
Verify the service dependency graph is displayed
Verify nodes and connections are visible

title: View and interact with the service graph
description: Verifies that a user can inspect the rendered dependency graph, pan and zoom it, and fit it back to the viewport.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the applications list to load
Select an application from the list
Verify graph nodes and edges are displayed
Pan the graph canvas
Zoom the graph canvas
Fit the graph to the viewport
Verify the graph remains visible in the viewport

title: Recover the applications list after simulated errors
description: A tester can turn on simulated API errors, see the applications list fail, then turn errors off and recover normal loading.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Enable simulated error mode
Verify an error state is visible in the applications list
Disable simulated error mode
Retry loading the applications list
Verify the applications list is displayed

title: Recover the graph after simulated errors
description: A tester can load an app, turn on simulated API errors for the graph, and then recover the graph after turning errors off and retrying.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the applications list to finish loading
Select a mock application from the applications list
Enable simulated error mode
Verify an error state is visible in the graph area
Disable simulated error mode
Retry loading the graph
Verify the service dependency graph is displayed

title: Recover apps list after loading error
description: Verifies that a user can enter the simulated apps error state and recover by retrying until the applications list loads.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Enable the simulated API error mode
Verify an applications error state is displayed
Disable the simulated API error mode
Retry loading the applications
Verify the applications list is displayed

title: Recover graph after loading error
description: Verifies that a user can enter the simulated graph error state and recover by retrying until the graph renders.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the applications list to load
Select an application from the list
Enable the simulated API error mode
Verify a graph error state is displayed
Disable the simulated API error mode
Retry loading the graph
Verify the graph is displayed

title: Select and clear a service node
description: Verifies that a user can select a service node on the graph and clear that selection by clicking the canvas background.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the applications list to load
Select an application from the list
Click a service node on the graph
Verify the service node is selected
Click the graph canvas background
Verify the node selection is cleared

title: Open the node inspector and switch tabs
description: Verifies that selecting a service node opens the inspector and that the user can switch between Config and Runtime views.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the applications list to load
Select an application from the list
Click a service node on the graph
Verify the node inspector is displayed
Switch to the Runtime tab
Switch back to the Config tab
Verify the inspector shows the selected node details

title: Use graph controls to inspect the canvas
description: A user can zoom, fit, and pan the dependency graph to inspect the service layout.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the applications list to finish loading
Select a mock application from the applications list
Use the graph zoom controls
Use the fit-to-view control
Pan the graph canvas
Verify the graph remains visible and positioned within the viewport

title: Switch to another application
description: Verifies that selecting a different mock application updates the selection and refreshes the graph for the new app.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the applications list to load
Select an application from the list
Select a different application from the list
Verify the selection updates in the list
Verify the graph updates for the newly selected application

title: Edit node details in the inspector
description: Verifies that a user can update a node name and description in the inspector and see those edits reflected locally.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the applications list to load
Select an application from the list
Click a service node on the graph
Edit the node name
Edit the node description
Verify the edited node details are displayed in the inspector

title: Open the node inspector from a selected service
description: A user can select a service node and open the inspector to review its details.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the applications list to finish loading
Select a mock application from the applications list
Select a service node in the graph
Open the node inspector
Verify the node inspector is displayed
Verify selected node details are visible

title: Keep load controls in sync
description: Verifies that adjusting the load slider or numeric input keeps both controls synchronized and updates the node information shown in the inspector.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the applications list to load
Select an application from the list
Click a service node on the graph
Adjust the load percentage using the slider
Enter a matching numeric load value
Verify the load controls remain synchronized
Verify the updated load value is reflected in the inspector

title: Open the mobile drawer and inspect a node
description: A mobile user can open the slide-over panel, select an app and node, and see the inspector appear in the drawer.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Set the viewport to a small screen size
Open the mobile panel
Select a mock application from the applications list
Select a service node in the graph
Verify the slide-over panel is displayed
Verify the node inspector is displayed in the panel

title: Switch inspector tabs for runtime details
description: A user can open the inspector and switch between configuration and runtime information for the selected node.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the applications list to finish loading
Select a mock application from the applications list
Select a service node in the graph
Open the node inspector
Switch to the runtime tab in the inspector
Verify runtime information is displayed
Switch back to the configuration tab in the inspector
Verify configuration fields are displayed

title: Auto-open the mobile panel when selecting a node
description: A mobile user can select a node on the canvas and have the panel open automatically to show the node details.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Set the viewport to a small screen size
Select a mock application from the applications list
Select a service node in the graph
Verify the mobile panel opens automatically
Verify the selected node details are visible in the panel

title: View runtime status and metrics for a node
description: Verifies that a selected service node shows its status pill and runtime metrics in the inspector.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the applications list to load
Select an application from the list
Click a service node on the graph
Switch to the Runtime tab
Verify the node status is displayed
Verify runtime metrics are displayed

title: Switch apps and refresh the graph
description: A user can switch between mock applications and see the service graph update to match the newly selected app.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the applications list to finish loading
Select one mock application from the applications list
Wait for the graph to finish loading
Select a different mock application from the applications list
Verify the service dependency graph refreshes for the newly selected app
Verify the selected app changes in the applications list

title: Reset local inspector edits when switching apps
description: Verifies that edits made in the inspector are local to the current app and reset after switching to another app and back.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the applications list to load
Select an application from the list
Click a service node on the graph
Edit the node name
Select a different application from the list
Select the original application from the list
Verify the original node details are restored
